nasb.text: But he began to curse and swear, “I do not know this man you are talking about!”

esv.text: But he began to invoke a curse on himself and to swear, “I do not know this man of whom you speak.”

cnv.text: 彼得就發咒起誓說：“我不認得你們說的這個人！”

ccb.text: 彼得又赌咒又发誓，说：“我根本不认识你们说的这个人。”

csbs.text: 他就开始赌咒并起誓说：“我不认识你们所讲的这个人。”
